home.hero_subtitle: An intelligent, multimodal platform to empower rural communities.
home.dashboard_desc: View all reported problems, generate AI-matched volunteer teams, track assignments, and manage resolution status.
home.submit_desc: Log a new village issue with photos, audio, and location data. AI will analyse the media and suggest the right team.
home.volunteer_desc: View your assignments, track your impact, and submit "Before & After" proof for completed tasks.
home.live_map_desc: Inspect the live spatial distribution of problems, progress, and completed work across the network.
home.hero_body: Gram Connect uses multimodal AI to match volunteers with critical village needs, ensuring expertise goes exactly where it's needed most.
home.feature_multimodal_desc: Villagers can report problems using audio, photos, or text in their local language.
home.feature_matching_desc: Our Nexus Engine finds the perfect team based on skills, logistics, and fairness.
home.feature_map_desc: Coordinators visualize problems and volunteer deployments on an interactive map.

dashboard.no_problems_found: No problems found matching your filters.
dashboard.live_map_desc: Markers are driven by the persisted backend records.
dashboard.map_note_1: Villager reports are stored with persistent profile and media records.
dashboard.map_note_2: Completed tasks keep proof attachments on the same case record.
dashboard.map_note_3: The map can be filtered by status using the controls below.
dashboard.low_coverage_note: Note: skill coverage is below 30%. Consider increasing the team size or selecting domain specialists manually.

submit.success_desc: Your problem report has been saved and volunteers will be matched shortly.
submit.coordinator_intro: capture the problem and attach any supporting media.
submit.villager_intro: Report a problem as a villager. Describe what's happening and attach any evidence you have.

volunteer.dashboard_subtitle: Your active assignments and completed tasks.
volunteer.no_active_assignments: No active assignments at the moment.

map.title: Problem locations & volunteer deployments
map.subtitle: Browse reported issues on the map, filter by location or status, and inspect the live problem stream.
map.no_problems: No problems match the current filters.
